name: Logo Yazilim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Logo Yazilim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. develops software solutions in Turkey and internationally. The company provides ERP solutions, which include Logo j-Platform, Logo Tiger Wings Enterprise, Logo Tiger 3 Enterprise, Logo Tiger Wings, Logo Tiger 3, Logo Netsis Wings Enterprise, Logo Netsis 3 Enterprise, Logo Netsis Wings, and Logo Netsis 3 Standard; and business analytics solutions, such as Logo Mind Insight, Logo Mind Navigator, and Logo Mind Budget. It also offers e-Invoice, e-Archive invoice, e-Ledger, e-Dispatch, e-Producer Receipt, e-Reconciliation, e-Extract, Connect Banka, Connect B2b, eLogo e-Tahsilat, and e-Self-Employment Invoice; Logo Isbasi, Logo Start 3, Logo GO Wings, Logo GO 3, Logo Netsis Wings Entegre, Logo Netsis 3 Entegre, and Logo Mali M√É¬ºsavir 3; warehouse management system solutions, consisting of Logo WMS Platform and Logo WMS; Logo Mobile Sales; and Logo Total Soft products, such as Logo Charisma ERP, Logo Charisma HCM, Logo Charisma Analyzer, Logo Charisma Medical Software, and Logo Charisma Leasing. In addition, the company provides human resources solutions, consisting of Logo j-HR, Logo Tiger 3 HR, Logo Bordro Plus, Logo Netsis 3 HR, Logo Netsis 3 Bordro, and Logo Payroll; retail solutions, including Logo Diva Retail, Logo Diva Service, Logo Diva Channel, and Logo Diva Shop; ecosystem solutions; Logo Infosoft products, such as Logo Jugnu √Ç¬ñ ERP, Logo SMART DMS & SFA, and Logo CaptainBiz; CRM solutions, which includes Logo CRM; and project solutions that comprises of Logo Treasury Wizard and Logo B2B. Further, it offers work flow management solutions, such as Logo Flow; occupational health and safety, consisting of eLogo ISG; and digital transformation services, including digital transformation consultancy, project management, project implementation, custom software development, customization and integration, post-project support services, and system management. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Gebze, Turkey.
